CustomField.description: The HTTP response status code returned by the external service (e.g. 200 = success, 400 = bad request, 401 = unauthorized, 404 = not found, 500 = server error). System-populated after the callout completes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: HTTP response code from the external service. Common codes: 200 (success), 400 (bad request), 401 (unauthorized), 500 (server error).
CustomField.label: Status Code
